AMENDMENT NO. 1 TO MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

between NimbusPay ("Vendor") and Customer Corp. ("Customer")
Effective Date: June 1, 2025

This Amendment No. 1 (the "Amendment") amends the Master Services
Agreement effective June 1, 2024 (the "Agreement") between Vendor and
Customer.

1. REVISED PER-EMPLOYEE FEE
1.1 [Reserved]
2. FEE UPDATE
2.1 Effective June 1, 2025, the per-employee fee set forth in MSA Section
5.1 is amended to $8.50 per active employee per month.

3. ONBOARDING DISCOUNT
3.1 Customer shall receive an onboarding discount of fifteen percent (15%)
off recurring fees for the six-month period from June 1, 2025 through
November 30, 2025.

4. ONE-TIME TAX FILING FEE
4.1 Customer shall pay a one-time year-end tax filing fee of $1,200.00,
invoiced in December 2025.

5. NO OTHER CHANGES
5.1 Except as expressly modified by this Amendment, all other terms of the
Agreement remain in full force and effect.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Amendment as of the
Effective Date above.
